name: Critical High Return Rate — Apparel
description: Return rate exceeds 41% driven by missing size charts and quality issues on clothing listings. Account at suspension risk.
context: Seller has 62 returns out of 150 orders. Primary cause: apparel listings LST002, LST005, LST012 lack size charts. Customers receive wrong sizes, triggering returns.

name: Seller Rating Decline — Multiple Product Complaints
description: Seller rating dropped from 4.2 to 3.2 over 3 months due to consistent quality complaints across product lines.
context: Rating decline driven by 1-star reviews on LST006, LST011, LST012. Customers report product not matching listing description.

name: Account Suspension Risk — Combined Violations
description: Account at imminent suspension risk due to rating (3.2), return rate (41%), and open policy violations.
context: All three suspension triggers are active: rating below 3.5, return rate above 25%, and counterfeit product listing.

name: Price Above MRP Violation
description: Multiple listings with selling price exceeding MRP. LST006 priced at ₹1,599 against MRP of ₹999.
context: LST006 earbuds, LST046 artifact both priced above MRP. Amazon flagged LST006 for immediate suppression.

name: Counterfeit Product Suspicion
description: LST030 claims to sell genuine Apple iPhone charger at ₹199 — far below Apple's retail price. Flagged as counterfeit.
context: Customer reviews confirm product is not genuine Apple. Packaging looks fake. Price anomaly (₹199 vs ₹2000+ retail) triggered algorithm flag.

name: Abnormal Refund Spike — Electronics
description: Bluetooth earbuds (LST006) account for 8 returns in 60 days. Return rate for this SKU is 62%.
context: LST006 returns cite: dead earbud, battery not as advertised, ANC not working, sound quality poor. Root cause: supplier batch defect.

name: Late Shipment Spike — Festival Season
description: 4 orders delayed during December festival season. Late shipment rate spiked to 4.7%.
context: December festival season caused courier delays. Orders ORD-2024-0058, ORD-2024-0078, ORD-2024-0085, ORD-2025-0122 all delayed 4-10 days.

name: Listing Suppression — Missing Size Charts
description: 8 apparel and footwear listings suppressed by Meesho algorithm for missing mandatory size charts.
context: LST002, LST005, LST008, LST012, LST019, LST021, LST034, LST045 all lack size charts. Platform guidelines mandate size charts for all clothing and footwear.

name: Payment Deduction Dispute
description: 4 payout cycles show unexplained deductions totaling ₹7,815 above expected amounts.
context: PAY-2024-003: duplicate return deduction ₹1,810. PAY-2024-005: 50% penalty ₹2,660. PAY-2024-007: GST mismatch ₹1,250. PAY-2025-002: late shipping penalty ₹980.

name: High Cancellation Rate — Out of Stock
description: Seller-initiated cancellation rate at 1.3% due to inventory miscounts and out-of-stock situations.
context: ORD-2024-0014 and ORD-2025-0149 cancelled by seller. LST043 is completely out of stock. Inventory sync issues causing overselling.

name: Repeat Customer Complaints — LST012
description: Women's Ethnic Printed Kurti (LST012) has 11 returns from different customers with consistent quality complaints.
context: LST012 return reasons: wrong size (3), transparency (2), color wrong (2), poor stitching (2), threads hanging (2). Clear product quality and description issues.

name: Policy Violation — Restricted Health Products
description: LST016 and LST042 contain health products with unverified medical claims requiring regulatory approval.
context: LST016 claims 'guaranteed weight loss in 7 days'. LST042 claims 'scientifically proven' without citations. Both require CDSCO certification per health product policy.

name: GST Compliance Failure
description: GST applied at wrong rate on fashion items resulting in ₹1,250 excess deduction.
context: Fashion items taxable at 5% GST but system applied 18% GST in December settlement. HSN code mapping error in seller's product catalog.

name: Fraud Detection — Return Abuse by CUST-1040
description: Customer CUST-1040 has initiated 8 returns in 3 months with inconsistent and implausible return reasons.
context: CUST-1040 returned: Kurta (fake return claim), Sandals (claimed fraud), 1 Kurta (repeat abuse - 8th return). Pattern matches buyer fraud playbook — return different product or empty box.

name: Image Quality Issue — Multiple Listings
description: 7 listings have insufficient images below the minimum 3-image threshold. 2 listings have zero images.
context: LST003 and LST024 have zero images. LST002, LST005, LST012, LST026, LST035 have fewer than 3 images. Images required minimum 1000x1000px per Meesho policy.

name: Category Mismatch — LST041
description: LST041 (Women's Handbag) incorrectly listed under Electronics category causing misrouted search traffic.
context: Handbag listed under Electronics receives 90% fewer relevant impressions. Category mismatch also violates marketplace listing rules.

name: Keyword Stuffing — SEO Violation
description: LST013 title contains 12+ repetitions of the word 'kurta' in an attempt to game search algorithms.
context: LST013 title: 'BEST QUALITY LOWEST PRICE kurta kurta kurta shirt ethnic wear festival party'. Meesho algorithm flagged for keyword abuse.

name: OCR Mismatch — Size Information Conflict
description: LST049 product images contain text contradicting the listing description — image says 'Only L Available' but listing says 'S, M, L, XL, XXL'.
context: Vision model detected embedded text in product image. Conflict between image text and listing attributes triggers automatic audit.

name: Late Payout Settlement
description: PAY-2025-006 has been pending for over 25 days without settlement — significantly beyond the 7-day expected cycle.
context: Account performance review triggered payout hold. ₹14,250 in total pending payouts affecting seller's working capital.

name: Safety Complaint — Neck Massager
description: LST050 received a complaint about unsafe electric shocks during operation. Product may be dangerous.
context: Customer reported electric shocks at level 5 which should be safe. Possible electrical fault in specific production batch. FDA-cleared device should not cause injury at recommended settings.

name: RTO Spike — Cash on Delivery Orders
description: 2 orders returned to seller due to delivery failure — customers unavailable or refused delivery.
context: ORD-2024-0023 (3 delivery attempts, no answer) and ORD-2025-0127 (customer refused delivery) both returned to sender. COD orders have higher RTO risk.

name: Duplicate Listing Detection
description: LST027 is an exact duplicate of LST001 with same SKU, description and images. Violates unique listing policy.
context: LST027 uses SKU 'KRT-BLU-M-001-DUP' which conflicts with LST001 SKU. Duplicate listings split review scores and confuse buyers.
